content_preview:
[package]
name = "nexus6"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"
description = "NEXUS-6 Discovery Engine — 130+ lenses, OUROBOROS evolution, n=6 constant matching"
authors = ["need-singularity"]
license = "MIT"
repository = "https://github.com/need-singularity/nexus6"
keywords = ["discovery", "telescope", "n6", "perfect-number", "lens"]
categories = ["science", "mathematics"]

[lib]
name = "nexus6"
crate-type = ["lib", "cdylib"]
# cdylib = Python 모듈 (.so/.dylib) 생성 필수
# maturin build --release --fea
